Enumeration Case# kModeSenseSBCDeviceSpecific_DPOFUABit

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.6+

```
kModeSenseSBCDeviceSpecific_DPOFUABit = 4
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/1555554-device_specific_parameter_bitfie/kmodesensesbcdevicespecific_dpofuabit#discussion)

Bit to indicate DPO and FUA bits are accepted by the device server.
